hyperedges.label: tx route validate to build to serialize pattern
Client tx build/sign/confirm flow (build route -> useTransaction -> confirm)
Shared ToolPage scaffold: check-authority gate + useTransaction + BalanceCheck
MDX content pipeline (index + article pages share lib/content)
Data modules assembled by the read-through token-page cache
Local Redis emulation for dev (stub backs redis client + rate limiter)
Liquidity Pool Content (blogs + docs covering pools/LP/Raydium)
Browser RPC proxy data flow (client → /api/rpc → pool → endpoint)
Tx builders lease one RPC and run connection+umi+simulate on it
SEO surfaces consuming the resolved SITE_URL
